title: 20Pcs Red Velvet Bows for Christmas Tree Decoration- 15x32cm Rustic Ribbon Bow Ornaments, Pre-Tied for Gift Wrapping, Wreath, Garland, Fireplace & Staircase, Holiday Home Decor
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: This set includes 20 luxury velvet Christmas bows, each measuring 5.9" x 11.81"—perfect for decorating your xmas tree, holiday wreaths, garlands, or gifts. Plenty to spread festive cheer throughout your home!

PREMIUM MATERIALS: Made from high-quality velvet, these christmas tree bows are soft, long-lasting, and elegant. The rich texture holds its shape, making them perfect for wreath bows, gift wrapping, or fireplace decor.

ELEGANT DESIGN: These decorative christmas tree bows feature a vintage rustic charm with lush loops and vibrant colors. Add timeless elegance to your holiday decor, from staircases to wedding festivities!
EFFORTLESS TO USE: Each velvet present bow comes with a 15cm built-in wire tie for easy hanging. Quickly attach them to trees, garlands, or gifts—no fuss, just instant holiday beauty!

VERSATILE HOLIDAY USE: These luxury velvet Christmas bows are more than just tree ornaments—use them to adorn your Christmas tree for a cohesive, high-end look. Style wreaths, garlands, and stair railings for a festive home entrance.Add a holiday touch to wedding decor, centerpieces, and banisters. Drape over fireplace mantels or windows for cozy seasonal charm
description: Each bow measures 5.9" x 11.81" (15x32cm), making them the perfect size for festive embellishments. Crafted from luxurious velvet, these bows are soft, long-lasting, and designed to hold their shape throughout the holiday season. Why Choose Our Velvet Christmas Bows? ✔ Premium Quality – Made from high-grade velvet fabric for a rich, elegant finish that resists fraying. ✔ Vintage Rustic Charm – The classic loop design and deep, festive colors bring warmth to any holiday setting. ✔ Easy to Use – Each bow features a built-in wire tie for effortless hanging on trees, garlands, wreaths, staircases, or gifts. ✔ Versatile Holiday Decor – Perfect for Christmas tree bows, gift wrapping, fireplace mantels, wedding decor, and festive party styling. ✔ 20-Piece Set – Plenty of bows to decorate multiple spaces or share with friends and family! Endless Decorative Possibilities These luxury velvet Christmas bows are more than just tree ornaments—use them to: ✔ Adorn your Christmas tree for a cohesive, high-end look. ✔ Elevate gift wrapping with elegant velvet present bows. ✔ Style wreaths, garlands, and stair railings for a festive home entrance. ✔ Add a holiday touch to wedding decor, centerpieces, and banisters. ✔ Drape over fireplace mantels or windows for cozy seasonal charm. Perfect Holiday Gift Idea Looking for a unique stocking stuffer or hostess gift? These decorative Christmas bows make a thoughtful present for crafters, decorators, and holiday enthusiasts. Upgrade your holiday decor with these festive ribbon bows—order yours today and spread the Christmas cheer in style!
